detail.description:
Jigsawcard – The HD Jigsaw Puzzle & Solitaire Card Game
Experience an exciting new way to enjoy jigsaw puzzles! In Jigsawcard, you’ll flip, slide, match, and snap puzzle cards to reveal breathtaking HD images. The game seamlessly blends classic jigsaw satisfaction with smooth solitaire card-sliding mechanics and mysterious face-down cards that await your revealing flip, creating a relaxing yet addictive, surprising, and truly memory‑challenging adventure.
How to Play
